release_gates.criteria: All benchmark JSON assets are parseable and contain required top-level fields.
For every candidate plan, hard-constraint validation returns structured pass/fail details.
For equipment failure, urgent order, and due-date change scenarios, the system generates at least one feasible plan.
The solver returns ranked candidate plans with KPI vectors and a recommended plan.
Every confirmation or override creates an auditable DecisionRecord with user, timestamp, selected plan, recommendation, and reason when applicable.
Every impact report and solver run is reproducible from an immutable schedule snapshot version.
